MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.claude_persistence
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/claude_persistence.py (293 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Claude Persistence Manager
=====================================

Manage Claude Code in a persistent tmux session with MCP tools.

This enables Claude to:
- Maintain context across deliberations
- Access MCP memory tools
- Stay alive between requests

"Claude never forgets when we don't let h

CLASSES:
- ClaudeTmuxManager: Manage Claude Code in persistent tmux session with MCP tools.

Provides:
- Sessi
  Methods: async def ensure_session_alive(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def send_prompt(self, prompt: str, timeout: float=60.0) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def load_persistent_memory(self)
  Methods: async def keep_alive(self, interval: int=300)
  Methods: def start_keepalive(self)
  Methods: def stop_keepalive(self)
  Methods: async def kill_session(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_claude_manager() -> ClaudeTmuxManager
- async def query_claude_persistent(prompt: str) -> Optional[str]
